block_or_reference: template-only testnet block, transaction hash, CI run, or deployment transcript reference
command_or_source_system: template-only testnet deployment command, CI job, explorer, or operator transcript
redaction_statement: Template only; no raw logs, credentials, signing material, private URLs, or unreleased drop payloads are present.
template_notice: Template only. This file is not completion evidence and does not mark public beta or production ready.
operator_notes: Replace this template with testnet deployment transcript, chain ID, transaction references, sanitized broadcast, generated manifest, address book, explorer verification status, and reviewer confirmation.
